title: Phase 2: Implement lock file mechanism - Alma RS Lending Request Automation

affectedMethods: setup_logging() - daily rotation for scheduled mode
process_single_run() - lock acquire/release, run log entry

batchFileSpec.contents: No --watch, no pause, exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%, full paths, headless

lockFileStrategy.pidTracking: Write PID via os.getpid() and timestamp as JSON to lock file
lockFileStrategy.staleDetection: os.kill(pid, 0) for PID liveness, mtime age fallback (10 min threshold)

loggingChanges.dailyReport: Daily append CSV output/reports/processed_{YYYYMMDD}.csv - header on first write, append rows after
loggingChanges.dailyRunLog: Daily output/logs/runs_{YYYYMMDD}.log - one line per invocation with timestamp, files_found, files_processed, status, duration
loggingChanges.generalLog: TimedRotatingFileHandler daily rotation to output/logs/processor.log for scheduled mode
loggingChanges.perFileLog: New output/file_logs/{YYYYMMDD}_{HHMMSS}_{filename}.log per TSV file with detailed step-by-step processing

riskAssessment.mitigation: Lock file with PID + Task Scheduler 'do not start new instance'
riskAssessment.risk: Overlapping executions creating duplicate lending requests

riskAssessment.mitigation: PID liveness check + mtime age fallback
riskAssessment.risk: Stale lock after crash blocks all future runs

riskAssessment.mitigation: Append mode, flush after each row
riskAssessment.risk: Daily CSV corruption on mid-write crash

riskAssessment.mitigation: All changes additive, watch mode preserved
